title: Understanding Displacement
text: Displacement is the change in position of an object. Since the particle is moving at a constant velocity, you can calculate displacement using the formula: displacement $$=$$ velocity * time.

title: Identify the Given Values
text: You are given the velocity of the particle as $$30$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$ and the time interval as $$5.0$$ s. Use these values in the displacement formula.

title: Calculate the Displacement
text: Using the formula displacement $$=$$ velocity * time, substitute the given values: displacement $$=$$ $$30$$ * $$5$$.
